name: hash_md5
description: Generate an MD5 hash of the given input string.

name: hash_sha1
description: Generate a SHA-1 hash of the given input string.

name: hash_sha256
description: Generate a SHA-256 hash of the given input string.

name: hash_sha512
description: Generate a SHA-512 hash of the given input string.

name: hash_bcrypt
description: Generate a bcrypt hash of the given input string. Useful for password hashing.

name: hash_bcrypt_verify
description: Verify a string against a bcrypt hash. Returns true if matches.

arguments.name: hash
arguments.desc: The bcrypt hash to verify against

name: base64_encode
description: Encode a string to Base64.

name: base64_decode
description: Decode a Base64 string back to plain text.

name: url_encode
description: URL-encode a string (percent-encoding).

name: url_decode
description: Decode a URL-encoded string.

name: html_encode
description: Encode special characters in a string to HTML entities.

name: html_decode
description: Decode HTML entities in a string back to their original characters.

name: hex_encode
description: Encode a string to its hexadecimal representation.

name: hex_decode
description: Decode a hexadecimal string back to plain text.

name: generate_uuid
description: Generate a cryptographically secure UUID v4.

arguments.name: count
arguments.desc: Number of UUIDs to generate (1-100, default: 1)

name: generate_nanoid
description: Generate a NanoID — a compact, URL-friendly unique ID.

arguments.name: count
arguments.desc: Number of IDs to generate (1-100, default: 1)

name: generate_password
description: Generate a secure random password with configurable options.

arguments.name: count
arguments.desc: Number of passwords to generate (1-50, default: 1)

name: generate_random_hex
description: Generate a random hexadecimal string of the specified byte length.

arguments.name: bytes
arguments.desc: Number of random bytes (output will be 2x this length in hex)

name: jwt_decode
description: Decode a JWT and display its header and payload without verifying the signature.

name: jwt_validate
description: Validate the structure of a JWT. Checks format, Base64URL encoding, JSON validity, and expiration status.

name: json_format
description: Format (pretty-print) a JSON string with configurable indentation. Can also minify JSON.

arguments.name: indent
arguments.desc: Number of spaces for indentation (0 = minify, default: 2)

name: json_validate
description: Validate a JSON string and report any parsing errors with their approximate location.

name: json_path_query
description: Extract a value from a JSON object using a dot-notation path.

name: timestamp_to_date
description: Convert a Unix timestamp (seconds or milliseconds) to a human-readable ISO 8601 date string.

name: date_to_timestamp
description: Convert a date string to a Unix timestamp. Accepts ISO 8601 and common date formats.

name: number_base_convert
description: Convert a number between different bases (binary, octal, decimal, hexadecimal, or any base 2-36).

name: color_convert
description: Convert colors between HEX, RGB, and HSL formats.

name: byte_convert
description: Convert between byte units (B, KB, MB, GB, TB, PB). Supports binary (1024) and SI (1000) standards.

arguments.name: from_unit
arguments.desc: Source unit (B, KB, MB, GB, TB, PB)

arguments.name: binary
arguments.desc: Use binary (1024) instead of SI (1000) standard (default: true)

name: cidr_calculate
description: Calculate network details from a CIDR notation. Returns network address, broadcast, host range, and host count.

name: ip_validate
description: Validate and classify an IPv4 or IPv6 address. Returns type, class, scope, and whether it's private/loopback/multicast.

name: text_stats
description: Analyze text and return detailed statistics: character count, word count, line count, sentence count, paragraph count, and reading time.

name: lorem_ipsum
description: Generate Lorem Ipsum placeholder text.

arguments.name: type
arguments.desc: Type of output: paragraphs, sentences, or words (default: paragraphs)

name: case_convert
description: Convert a string between casing styles: camelCase, PascalCase, snake_case, kebab-case, CONSTANT_CASE, Title Case, and more.

arguments.name: to
arguments.desc: Target case style (camelCase, PascalCase, snake_case, kebab-case, CONSTANT_CASE, Title Case, lowercase, UPPERCASE)

name: slugify
description: Convert a string to a URL-friendly slug.

name: regex_test
description: Test a regular expression pattern against an input string. Returns all matches with groups and indices.

name: text_diff
description: Compare two strings and show a line-by-line diff. Lines prefixed with '+' are additions, '-' are deletions.
